name: RayHunter
description: IMSI-catcher / cell-site-simulator detector. Installs over ADB onto an Orbic RC400L 4G LTE hotspot and watches the radio for stingray-style attacks (2G downgrade, null-cipher, IMSI requests).
note: id matches adb_backend.ADB_PROFILES key 'rayhunter'. Installs via ADB push (platform-tools required); daemon serves a dashboard on :8080. Needs a deactivated SIM inserted to boot the radio stack.
